supabase.description: Supabase database access for Caicos team collaboration. Provides schema inspection, SQL query execution, RLS policy viewing, and data validation.

tools.name: query_schema
tools.description: Inspect database schema - view tables, columns, types, constraints. Essential for code generation.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Execute SQL queries against database. Used for testing and validation.

tools.name: view_rls_policies
tools.description: Read Row Level Security policies. Review security rules before coding.

tools.name: validate_query
tools.description: Validate SQL query syntax without executing.

tools.name: get_table_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific table.
